stonetop.summary: A giant ambush beetle that pulls prey down through the soil.

system.concept: A giant ambush beetle that pulls prey down through the soil.
system.description: Great big beetles that live out beneath the @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.nBvsH19B1bG2d4Di]{Flats}, preying on large game like horses and aurochs. They undermine the soil and lie in wait. @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.NS2bhYMi23m0eWao]{The Hillfolk} know what signs to watch for, but they rarely tell outsiders — what better way to keep the Flats free of fools?
